# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest released version of `llm-quota` receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | yes       |
| older   | no        |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security issues privately through GitHub's private vulnerability
reporting: open the repository's **Security** tab and choose **Report a
vulnerability**. This opens a private advisory visible only to the maintainer.

Please do not open a public issue for security reports.

Expect an initial acknowledgement within a few days. `llm-quota` is a small,
local-only tool maintained on a best-effort basis; confirmed fixes ship in the
next release.
